summary: Iteration 84: Bug Fix Verified - Service Validation Approval/Rejection now uses correct API URL format /validation/services/{type}/{id}/approve instead of old broken /validation/services/{id}/approve?collection={type}. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend E2E tests passed for both Approve and Reject flows.
critical_code_review_comments: ValidationManagement.jsx line 785: handleApprove correctly calls `/validation/services/${type}/${id}/approve` - VERIFIED
ValidationManagement.jsx line 808: submitRejection correctly calls `/validation/services/${type}/${id}/reject` - VERIFIED
ValidationManagement.jsx lines 818-829: allServices correctly maps service types (travel_route, hotel, car_rental, etc.) - CORRECT
Backend validation.py line 370-411: approve_service endpoint with {type}/{id} path params working correctly
Backend validation.py line 416-461: reject_service endpoint with {type}/{id} path params working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test travel routes: Buea→Limbe (id: 9a6db52f-ab59-4fae-8d28-6b20109b6679, approved), Douala→Yaoundé (id: 6a61b6c6-c1d1-4922-9bf9-8db32ffb684f, rejected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service validation bug is FIXED. The frontend now correctly calls /validation/services/{type}/{id}/approve and /validation/services/{type}/{id}/reject. Initial test failure was due to browser caching old JavaScript - resolved after frontend restart. All service types (travel_route, hotel, car_rental, etc.) use consistent URL format.

steps_verified: Services tab shows pending services badge
Click Services tab displays pending service cards
Service card shows type, route, operator, price
API returns 200, service removed from pending list
Services tab shows 'No pending services' after approval
Dialog has textarea for rejection reason
Confirm Reject calls correct API /validation/services/travel_route/{id}/reject with reason
API returns 200, service removed from pending list

bug_fix_summary.original_issue: Service approval in Validation Center didn't work - frontend called wrong API URL
bug_fix_summary.root_cause: Frontend was calling /validation/services/{id}/approve?collection={type} but backend expected /validation/services/{type}/{id}/approve
bug_fix_summary.fix_applied: Changed API URL construction in handleApprove (line 785) and submitRejection (line 808) to use correct format
bug_fix_summary.verification: E2E test confirmed correct URL format with 200 response and database status change
